metadata.title: Turning a 2v1 on VALORANT’s Bind with Smooth Angles and Calm Aim
metadata.description:
Watch this clutch 2v1 on Bind where smart positioning and patient peeks make all the difference. Notice the timing that flips the round.
What’s your favorite spot to hold on Bind?
